title: Meridian
description: Redesigning wealth management for the next generation of investors.
longDescription: Meridian needed a complete reimagining of their wealth management platform. We conducted extensive user research with both advisors and retail investors, designed a new information architecture, and delivered a modern interface that simplifies complex financial data into actionable insights.

title: Canopy
description: Connecting care teams with patients through intelligent communication.
longDescription: Canopy's care coordination platform was powerful but hard to use. We redesigned the entire patient-facing experience — from appointment scheduling to real-time messaging — while introducing AI-powered triage that routes patients to the right care team instantly.

title: Arcline
description: Transforming raw data into actionable insights with clarity and speed.
longDescription: Arcline's analytics platform had all the data but none of the clarity. We redesigned their dashboard experience from the ground up, introducing customizable views, natural language queries, and a design system that scales across their growing product suite.

title: Volta
description: A premium direct-to-consumer storefront built for conversion.
longDescription: Volta wanted a storefront that felt as premium as their products. We designed an editorial-meets-commerce experience that blends rich storytelling with seamless purchasing — resulting in a 40% increase in conversion rate within three months of launch.

title: Pulse
description: A people analytics platform that makes employee wellbeing measurable.
longDescription: Pulse needed to turn abstract employee sentiment into clear, actionable data for HR leaders. We designed a dashboard that surfaces trends in team health, engagement and burnout risk — powered by real-time survey data and AI-driven recommendations.

title: Hatch
description: Reimagining online learning with adaptive, bite-sized experiences.
longDescription: Hatch wanted to break the mold of passive video courses. We designed a mobile-first learning platform with adaptive pathways, spaced repetition, and social accountability features that keep learners engaged far beyond the first week.

title: Norde
description: Streamlining last-mile delivery with a driver-first approach.
longDescription: Norde's delivery drivers were fighting a clunky app that slowed them down. We redesigned the driver experience from scratch — large touch targets, voice-assisted navigation, and smart route optimization that adapts in real time to traffic and order changes.

title: Lumen
description: A smart building platform that turns energy data into savings.
longDescription: Lumen connects building sensors, energy meters, and climate systems into a single interface for property managers. We designed an intuitive dashboard that surfaces anomalies, forecasts consumption, and recommends optimizations — helping buildings reduce energy costs by up to 30%.
